name: Latest Media & Management
description: Adds Latest Media, Media Management, and Chat to the Jellyfin header. Includes End-to-End encrypted DMs and admin scheduled deletions.
overview: Comprehensive plugin providing recently added UI, admin media management, and integrated chat system with E2E encrypted private messaging.

versions.changelog: Hotfix: Fixed an issue where the JS injection interceptor could crash the entire Jellyfin web server if unhandled. Added strongly-typed interceptor schemas and fallback routines.
